subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-03-04
subcodes.first_line: The more we thank Bahá'u'lláh for these bounties with which He has encircled us, the more numerous will they become. When Bahá'u'lláh in the early history of the Caused desired to test any one
subcodes.subjects: @conference of Badasht, @scarcity of receptive souls, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @thankfulness; gratitude, @goodly deeds; actions
